features.heading: Encrypted Storage
features.description: Every file is encrypted before it reaches storage. Enable enhanced encryption for user-controlled keys that only you can unlock.

features.heading: Secure Document Management
features.description: Organize your files with folders, tags, custom metadata, favorites, threaded comments, and full activity audit logs.

features.heading: Flexible Sharing
features.description: Share documents and folders with link expiry, optional password protection, and granular read/write/share permission levels.

features.heading: Advanced Account Security
features.description: Protect your account with passkeys, two-factor authentication, recovery phrases, and real-time security alerts for suspicious activity.
